page: Microsoft Azure E64ads_v5 is a memory-optimized virtual machine belonging to the EADSv5 family. It runs on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor and is powered by an AMD EPYC 7763 processor using the x86_64 architecture. The server features 64 dedicated vCPUs mapped from 32 physical cores with multithreading enabled, operating at a clock speed of 3.525 GHz. It is equipped with 512.0 GB of system memory, providing a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per vCPU. Storage resources include 2458 GB of local disk capacity with Premium Storage capability, while no dedicated GPUs are present.

Benchmark evaluations indicate strong multi-core and memory subsystem capabilities. The server achieves top-tier status in PassMark memory scoring and registers strong performance in stress-ng multi-core CPU tests and cached memory bandwidth at 4154.72 GB/sec. However, uncached memory bandwidth drops to average levels, with 124.14 GB/sec read and 62.31 GB/sec write speeds. Cryptographic and integer operations perform strongly, as evidenced by high PassMark encryption scores and a Redis SET throughput of 63.59 million operations per second. Large-scale text generation on a 70B parameter LLM represents a performance bottleneck, registering in the bottom 25% at 2.67 tokens per second, whereas smaller model inference remains highly efficient.

The high memory density and substantial local storage capacity offer a balanced resource profile for memory-intensive enterprise workloads. The hardware configuration is optimized for database operations, large-scale data processing, and memory-cached web serving. It is designed for relational databases, in-memory caching layers like Redis, and multi-threaded data decompression tasks, though workloads requiring heavy GPU acceleration or massive single-threaded execution speeds may find more cost-effective alternatives.
description: Microsoft Azure E64ads_v5 is an x86_64 memory-optimized virtual machine powered by an AMD EPYC 7763 processor running at 3.525 GHz under the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 64 dedicated vCPUs, 512.0 GB of RAM, and 2458 GB of local storage. The processor includes AVX, AES, and SHA instruction set extensions, which support its strong cryptographic and integer performance. Benchmark data highlights top-tier memory performance and strong multi-core processing capabilities, including a high Redis SET throughput of 63.59 million operations per second and strong multi-threaded decompression. However, uncached memory bandwidth and large-scale LLM text generation represent relative performance tradeoffs. This server is designed for memory-intensive workloads, database management, and caching systems.
og_description: Microsoft Azure E64ads_v5 is a memory-optimized VM featuring 64 vCPUs, 512 GB RAM, and 2458 GB local storage, delivering top-tier memory performance and strong multi-core capabilities for databases.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure E64ads_v5 is a memory-optimized VM with 64 vCPUs, 512 GB RAM, and 2458 GB local storage, optimized for database and memory-heavy workloads.
tagline: A memory-optimized virtual machine featuring high-density RAM, local storage, and strong multi-core processing for demanding database and caching workloads.
bullet_points: Powered by AMD EPYC 7763 with 64 dedicated vCPUs and 512 GB RAM
Includes 2458 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability
Top-tier memory performance and strong multi-threaded decompression speeds
High Redis throughput of 63.59 million operations per second
Best suited for relational databases, in-memory caching, and data processing
